name: Spinach-Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lentils according to package directions. Set aside.
2. In a large saucepan heat cooking oil over medium heat. Add mustard seed and let cook for 1-2 minutes or until seeds pop.
3. Add onion and cook until tender.
4. Add spinach, broth, lemon juice, pepper, and coriander. Add lentils. Heat through and top with cheese.
Makes: 4-6 main dish servings.
